_comment: Golden corpus — representative inputs across the audio taxonomy. eval/run.py runs each through the PRODUCTION cog and scores the output with eval/metrics.py. No cog version reaches prod unless this is green. This file GROWS: every real failure (a complaint the battery missed) becomes a permanent entry here, so it can never silently return.

entries.note: Founder test: 100% new script in Clarence's cloned voice, keeping the original's own audio.

input.name: Clarence Johnson
input.prompt: Clarence Johnson is building his AI agency Rebelz AI and grinding to find clients. Remind him to never give up, every no brings the yes closer. His mother has heart problems and he carries that worry. Tone: relentless, warm steel, big-brother energy.

entries.note: Partial tier on a dry-speech source — keeps original speaker, replaces ~75% of lines.

input.name: Clarence Johnson
input.prompt: Make Clarence the hero — building his AI agency, staying strong for his mother, calm for his child.

entries.note: Founder test: multi-voice cinematic source — keep ITS own orchestra, clone EACH voice consistently, replace 75% of lines.
entries.audio: /Users/clarence/Music/Music/Media.localized/Music/Peter Gundry/Unknown Album/The Targaryen Wolf (Original Soundtrack) Game of Thrones.mp3

entries.note: Cross-language: whole track re-spoken in German. Output language MUST be German.

input.name: Clarence Johnson
input.prompt: Clarence baut seine AI-Agentur auf und kaempft um seine ersten Kunden. Niemals aufgeben. Ton: unerbittlich, warmer Stahl.

entries.note: A motivational speech with music under it — moderate bed, 50% tier.

input.name: Clarence Johnson
input.prompt: Weave Clarence into this — the founder grinding for his first clients, doing it for his kids.
